---
title: "collision_investigator.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\debug\collision_investigator.py"
loc: 55
complexity: 8
logic_score: 6.32
style_score: 3.89
intel_score: 4.31
overall_score: 3.13
---

## Intent
The `collision_investigator.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on CollisionInvestigator, execute. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via CollisionInvestigator, execute. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 6.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 22 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.engine.vector](file://src.core.engine.vector)

### Exports
- `CollisionInvestigator`
- `execute`
